title: 桜花賞の後に・灼熱の余韻

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... This intensity and exhaustion is something else! Still...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I can't get enough! So this is what the Classics feel like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After running her first Classic race, Vodka's face
is beaming with satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: H-how was that, Scarlet?! Looks like...I came out... ahead, huh? Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Look who's talking... Even though you're... breathing so hard... Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha. So are you... So how did it feel to run the
Oka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I lost, idiot... It obviously doesn't feel good! But...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's completely different... than normal races... I
really... ran the Oka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classics. The races everyone dreams of. As
expected, the thrill must be out of this world.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But Vodka! Don't get carried away just because
you beat me in one G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's still a long way to go on the road to the
Triple Tiara. Things won't go the same way at the
Japanese Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hah! If you're that into it, sounds like it's gonna
be a good race!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, you're on! Make sure you up your game
by then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: See ya there, rival!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: R-rival...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. What're you showing off for?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, at least your skills have caught up a little to
your pretentiousness...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Trainer. It's thanks to you I was able to
beat her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I ran today. I got to see what she can
bring.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do about the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The Derby?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having a good run in the Oka Sho is something to
celebrate. But it makes our next decision that
much more important...

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Vodka! What did you and Daiwa Scarlet talk
about after the race?

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
What do you think about your chances of winning
the Japanese Oaks?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I guess... I'm not quite sure how I feel
yet...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is crazy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought all I ever needed to do was chase my
dreams... but I guess you never really stop
dreamin', huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's rivalry with Daiwa Scarlet will only get
more complicated after the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Run in the Derby or run against her rival. This
time, choosing both is not an option.
choice_data_list:
What should I put down for your next race? For
now, at least.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If it's just for now, keep me on for the Derby.
But...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I gotta think for a bit. Actually, would ya mind
thinkin' about it with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may have beaten Daiwa Scarlet, but a dark,
heavy shadow now casts itself upon her face.
